title: System Settings
subtitle: Configure global system parameters. Changes take effect immediately across the dashboard.

telegram.title: Telegram Notifications
telegram.subtitle: Send trade alerts and system events to a Telegram chat.

credentialHint.saved: Test Connection and Send Test Message use saved credentials.
credentialHint.input: Test Connection will use the token entered above.

errors.chatIdRequired: A valid numeric Chat ID is required.

setupGuide.title: How to configure Telegram
setupGuide.step1: Open Telegram and search @BotFather. Send /newbot and follow the prompts.
setupGuide.step2: Copy the bot token provided by BotFather.
setupGuide.step3: Open a chat with your new bot and send /start.
setupGuide.step4: Get your Chat ID using the Telegram getUpdates API or a helper tool.
setupGuide.step5: Paste the token and Chat ID above, then click Test Connection.
setupGuide.warning: Never share your bot token. If leaked, regenerate it immediately via BotFather.

timezone.label: System Timezone
timezone.description: All timestamps displayed in the dashboard will use this timezone. Data is always stored in UTC.

saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

note.title: How it works
note.utcStorage: All trade data is stored in UTC internally — no data is changed.
note.displayOnly: This setting controls display only; it converts timestamps at the presentation layer.
note.immediate: Changes apply instantly to all pages without a reload.

exchange.title: Exchange Configuration
exchange.subtitle: Configure Binance API credentials for live trading.
exchange.activeEnvironmentHint: Orders will be routed to this environment for live trading.
exchange.testnetApiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Binance Testnet API key
exchange.testnetApiSecretPlaceholder: Enter your Binance Testnet API secret
exchange.pendingSwitchTestnet: Pending: will switch active environment to Testnet on Save.
exchange.pendingSwitchMainnet: Pending: will switch active environment to Mainnet on Save.

confirmSwitchToMainnet.title: Switch active environment to Mainnet?
confirmSwitchToMainnet.message: All future orders will execute on Binance using REAL FUNDS. Make sure your Live credentials are configured and tested before proceeding.

confirmSwitchToTestnet.title: Switch active environment to Testnet?
confirmSwitchToTestnet.message: Orders will be sent to Binance Testnet (testnet.binance.vision). No real funds will be used.

exchange.testnetWarning: Warning: You are switching to Mainnet. This will use real funds for all future orders.
exchange.restartWarning: Note: Ingestor and HistoricalCollector services require restart for credential changes to take effect.

errors.keyRequired: API Key is required for first-time setup.
errors.secretRequired: API Secret is required for first-time setup.

setupGuide.toggle: Setup guide — How to get your Binance API Key
setupGuide.title: Step-by-step: Create a Binance API Key
setupGuide.step1: Log in to your Binance account and go to Account → API Management.
setupGuide.step2: Click 'Create API', choose 'System generated', and give it a label.
setupGuide.step3: Enable permissions: 'Enable Reading' and 'Enable Spot & Margin Trading' only.
setupGuide.step4: Set IP Access Restriction to your server IP for security (recommended).
setupGuide.step5: Copy the API Key and Secret shown — the Secret is only shown once.
setupGuide.warning: Never share your API Secret. Revoke and regenerate it immediately if it is ever exposed.

risk.title: Risk Management
risk.subtitle: Configure risk parameters for trade evaluation. Changes take effect immediately.
risk.maxDrawdownHint: Halt trading when daily loss exceeds this percentage of account balance (0.1 – 100).
risk.minRiskRewardHint: Reject trades with risk/reward below this ratio (0.5 – 10).
risk.minOrderNotionalHint: Reject orders whose notional is below this amount. Example: 5 = each order must be >= $5.
risk.maxOrderNotionalHint: Trim order quantity if notional exceeds this amount. Example: 200 = each order capped at $200.
risk.cooldownHint: Minimum seconds between consecutive orders on the same symbol (0 – 3600).
risk.saveSuccess: Risk settings saved and applied to RiskGuard.
risk.liveWarning: These parameters control live trade evaluation. Changes are applied immediately.

orderAmountLimit.title: Order Amount Limits
orderAmountLimit.subtitle: Set the minimum and maximum quote value allowed per order.
orderAmountLimit.minOrderAmountHint: Reject orders whose notional value is below this amount.
orderAmountLimit.maxOrderAmountHint: Reject orders whose notional value exceeds this amount.
orderAmountLimit.saveSuccess: Order amount limits saved and applied to Executor.
orderAmountLimit.saveFailed: Failed to save order amount limits.

errors.rangeInvalid: Minimum order amount must be less than or equal to maximum order amount.

strategy.title: Strategy Configuration
strategy.subtitle: Adjust default order sizing. Applied immediately to Strategy via Redis without restart.
strategy.defaultOrderNotionalHint: Each buy order will target this notional value. Example: 25 = each order is $25.
strategy.minOrderNotionalHint: If calculated quantity is below this, it will be raised automatically. Must be less than default.
strategy.saveSuccess: Saved and applied to Strategy via Redis.

errors.defaultRequired: Default order value must be greater than 0.
errors.rangeInvalid: Min value must be less than default value.

housekeeper.title: HouseKeeper
housekeeper.subtitle: Configure automated data cleanup and retention.
housekeeper.scheduleHint: Time of day in UTC when the cleanup job runs.
housekeeper.restartWarning: HouseKeeper service restart required for changes to take effect.

errors.invalidSchedule: Schedule must be in HH:MM format (e.g. 03:15).
